Package mru.store.model

Class Toy

java.lang.Object
mru.store.model.Toy
Direct Known Subclasses:
Animals, BoardGames, Figures, Puzzles
public abstract class Toy extends Object
This class represents the general attributes each toy has in the database.
Author:
kaydence eng, xavier yick

    Toy(String serialNumber, String toyName, String toyBrand, double toyPrice, int availableCount, int appropriateAge)
